clientcontrol.gui.title: ClientControl Config
config.clientcontrol.enableMod.name: Enable Mod
config.clientcontrol.enableAutoWalk.name: Enable Auto Walk
config.clientcontrol.calibrationRate.des:
Record calibration points every X ms during recording
Auto-correct position during playback
config.clientcontrol.blockEventCalibrati:
0 = Off
1 = Only place calibration
2 = Full calibration (dig & place)
config.clientcontrol.recordingFlushInter: Write recording data to disk every N ticks
config.clientcontrol.maxRecordingTime.de: Auto stop recording after this time
config.clientcontrol.moveSpeed.name: Move Speed
config.clientcontrol.moveSpeed.desc: Base move speed multiplier for auto walking
config.clientcontrol.sneakSpeedMultiplie: Sneak speed relative to walking speed
config.clientcontrol.bulldozerWidth.name: Bulldozer Width
config.clientcontrol.bulldozerMargin.des: Extra blocks to dig beyond width/height
config.clientcontrol.bulldozerDepth.name: Bulldozer Depth
config.clientcontrol.bulldozerDepth.desc: Max blocks to dig forward at once
config.clientcontrol.bulldozerFillMode.d: Auto fill holes under feet with dirt after digging
config.clientcontrol.borderProtection.de: Auto stop movement when near world border
config.clientcontrol.borderMargin.name: Border Safety Distance (blocks)
config.clientcontrol.borderMargin.desc: Trigger protection when this close to border
config.clientcontrol.stopScreenRender.de: Disable screen rendering when AFK to save resources
config.clientcontrol.debugMode.name: Debug Mode
config.clientcontrol.debugMode.desc: Print more debug info to console
